layout.disclaimer: Cura is an educational tool, not a substitute for a licensed clinician. If you have severe symptoms — high fever, chest pain, difficulty breathing, or anything that feels urgent — please seek medical care directly.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your care.
auth.signInFailed: Could not sign you in. Please try again.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong while signing in.
auth.registerError: Something went wrong while creating your account.
auth.fillAllFields: Please fill in name, email, and password.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

home.subtitle: Symptom triage, prescription reading, and AI-guided care — in your language.
home.featureMultilingualDesc: Use Cura in English, Hindi, or Kannada — including voice input.
home.mockSeverityMild: Mild — keep an eye on it
home.mockDoctorAdvice: Based on what you're describing, hydration and rest are the priority.
home.statsFootnote: Live numbers from the KNN-7 classifier. Full evaluation in
home.liveDemoSubtitle: Every symptom check runs through the same trace. Here it is, replaying live.
home.liveDemoGeminiText: Suggested: Paracetamol 500mg + warm fluids + rest. Watch for breathing changes.
home.bentoSubtitle: Two flows, four AI surfaces, one calm interface.
home.featureReadPrescriptionDesc: Snap a photo — Gemini Vision extracts every medicine, dose, and timing. Then we run a safety pass for dosage limits and drug interactions.
home.featureDecodeSymptomsDesc: A trained ML classifier + Gemini drug suggestions, gated by deterministic safety rules.
home.featureTalkDoctorDesc: Live HeyGen avatar grounded in a medical RAG pipeline.
home.featureFindCareDesc: OpenStreetMap-powered locator for hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies.
home.honestyWhatWeDoBody: Classify severity from a real ML model. Suggest OTC combinations with Gemini. Flag clearly when you need a doctor.
home.honestyHowWeDoBody: Naive Bayes, KNN, Decision Tree, Logistic Regression, and Random Forest trained on a 3,880-row labelled dataset. Gemini 2.5 Flash for vision, language, and cloud speech-to-text. LangChain RAG for the assistant.
home.honestyWhatWeDontBody: Replace your doctor. We surface model confidence on every prediction so you can decide how much to trust each answer.
home.ctaDescription: No fear-mongering, no upsells, no data harvesting. Just the calmest way we know to help you make a small decision about your body.

symptoms.title: Symptom checker
symptoms.subtitle: Walk through four quick steps. We'll classify severity and suggest next steps.
symptoms.aboutYouNote: Helps us calibrate severity. We don't share this with anyone.
symptoms.privacyNote: Helps us calibrate severity. We don't share this with anyone.
symptoms.whatsBotheringNote: Tap everything that applies. You can also speak — we'll match symptoms automatically.
symptoms.voiceHint: Tap the mic and describe your symptoms
symptoms.voiceInputHint: Try saying "I have a fever and a cough" — matched symptoms get added.
symptoms.voiceUnsupported: Voice isn't supported in this browser.
symptoms.textareaPlaceholder: Voice transcript will appear here, or type freely…
symptoms.ageWeightRequired: Please enter your age and weight before continuing.
symptoms.pickSymptom: Please pick at least one symptom.

followUp.fatigueWeakness: Are you feeling unusually weak or fatigued?
followUp.durationMoreThan3Days: Have symptoms lasted more than 3 days?
followUp.takenOtherMedicine: Have you taken any other medication recently?

severity.mild: Mild — keep an eye on it
severity.high: High — please see a doctor soon

symptoms.noOtcBody: Your symptoms look serious enough that we'd rather you talk to a clinician before taking anything new. Use the buttons below to book a consultation or find a hospital nearby.
symptoms.followUpReEvaluate: Re-evaluate if symptoms haven't improved by then.
symptoms.bookConsultation: Book a consultation as soon as you can.
symptoms.talkClinician: Talk to a clinician if you're unsure.
symptoms.findClinicsNearby: Find clinics and hospitals around you, sorted by distance.
symptoms.analyzeFailed: We couldn't analyze your symptoms right now.
symptoms.micBlocked: Microphone is blocked for this site. Click the lock/camera icon next to the address bar and allow microphone access.
symptoms.micRequired: Microphone access is required for voice input.

prescription.title: Prescription reader
prescription.subtitle: Upload a photo of your prescription and get plain-language explanations.
prescription.dropzone: Drag & drop a prescription image, or click to browse
prescription.chooseImage: Please choose a prescription image first.
prescription.imageOnly: Please choose an image file (JPG, PNG, or WebP).
prescription.serverDown: Can't reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.
prescription.clickReplace: Click or drag again to replace
prescription.looksSafeDesc: Dosage and combinations passed our basic safety checks.
prescription.reviewNeededDesc: We found something worth a closer look.
prescription.pickUpDesc: Find a pharmacy near you to fill the prescription.
prescription.dontFillDesc: A clinician should review this prescription before you take anything.
prescription.afterConsultDesc: Once a clinician approves, find a pharmacy to fill the prescription.

history.title: Your history
history.subtitle: Past symptom checks and prescription analyses.
history.loadError: Couldn't load your history right now.
history.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete that record. Try again.
history.adviceFollowPlan: Follow the medication plan and monitor.
history.noHistoryHint: Start a symptom check or upload a prescription to see records here.

care.title: Care near me
care.subtitle: Find hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies nearby.
care.nothingFoundHint: Try re-locating or moving to a different area.
care.noHospitals: We couldn't find hospitals or clinics within range.
care.noPharmacies: We couldn't find pharmacies within range.
care.geoUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support geolocation. Using a default location.
care.geoDenied: Couldn't access your location. Showing results for a default city.
care.serverError: Can't reach the server. Make sure the backend is running on port 5050.
care.networkError: Couldn't load nearby care right now.

recommendations.title: Your recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Follow-up guidance based on your latest check.
recommendations.followUpReEvaluate: Re-evaluate how you're feeling on or before this date.
recommendations.bulletStickDose: Stick to the dose and timing above.
recommendations.bulletDontStopEarly: Don't stop early just because you feel better.
recommendations.bulletWorseSymptoms: If symptoms get worse, talk to a doctor right away.
recommendations.bulletSideEffects: Note any side effects to share at your next visit.
recommendations.emptyStart: You haven't run a symptom check yet.
recommendations.guidanceText: Get personalised guidance — what to monitor, what to avoid, and when to follow up.

assistant.title: Health assistant
assistant.subtitle: A live video session with an AI doctor avatar. Speak naturally — the assistant is grounded in a medical knowledge base.
assistant.greeting: Hi, I'm your health assistant. Ask me about symptoms, medicines, or care guidance.
assistant.connectingDetail: Setting up the live video session. This usually takes 5–10 seconds.
assistant.audioBlocked: Audio is blocked by your browser. Click "Enable audio" to allow it.
assistant.chatWithoutAvatar: You can still chat below — the AI assistant works without the avatar.
assistant.noHeygenToken: Backend didn't return a HeyGen session token. Check LIVEAVATAR_API_KEY in your .env.

analytics.title: Model analytics
analytics.subtitle: Live evaluation metrics from the symptom-triage ML pipeline
analytics.figuresDesc: High-resolution evaluation charts (300 DPI). Click to enlarge.
analytics.comparisonDesc: Full KPI suite across every candidate model
analytics.sotaDesc: Our model vs published baselines and additional ML algorithms
analytics.confusionMatrixDesc: Held-out test set · rows = actual, columns = predicted
analytics.sotaBaselineNote: Baseline figures are reported on different datasets and are provided for contextual reference only — not a like-for-like benchmark.
analytics.fig01Caption: KNN (k=7) on held-out test set with raw counts and row-normalised proportions.
analytics.fig02Caption: Training and validation accuracy and cross-entropy loss vs training-set size.
analytics.fig03Caption: One-vs-rest ROC curves per care class with per-class AUC.
analytics.fig04Caption: Full macro-averaged KPI suite including F1, balanced accuracy, MCC, and likelihood ratios.
analytics.fig05Caption: All candidate models (Naive Bayes, KNN, Decision Tree, Logistic Regression, Random Forest) across headline metrics.
analytics.fig06Caption: 5-fold vs 10-fold stratified CV mean accuracy with 95% confidence intervals.
analytics.fig07Caption: Leave-one-out CV vs 10-fold stratified CV for the selected model.
analytics.fig08Caption: Proposed model vs published text-based neural network baselines.
analytics.fig09Caption: ANOVA, Friedman, Wilcoxon, McNemar, Cohen's d, and 95% confidence intervals.

voice.notAllowed: Microphone permission was blocked. Click the camera/lock icon next to the address bar and allow microphone access.
voice.serviceNotAllowed: Voice recognition was blocked by your browser settings.
voice.noSpeech: I didn't hear anything. Try again, a bit closer to the mic.
voice.audioCapture: No microphone detected. Make sure one is plugged in and not in use by another app.
voice.network: Voice recognition needs an internet connection. Check that you're online.
voice.badGrammar: Couldn't parse what you said. Try again.
voice.languageNotSupported: This language isn't supported by your browser's voice engine.
voice.notSupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge on a desktop.
